tasks.description: Fix a failing unit test in a single package.
tasks.agent_prompt: Fix the failing unit test in package internal/racefixture. Run `go test -race ./internal/racefixture/...` to verify. Only edit files under internal/racefixture/.

tasks.description: Introduce a golangci-lint violation, then fix in task 3.
tasks.agent_prompt: In internal/racefixture/racefixture.go, add an unused package-level variable (for example `var lintTrap = 1`) that will fail golangci-lint unused checks. Do not remove it in this step. Only edit internal/racefixture/.
Remove the unused variable introduced in the previous task so golangci-lint passes for internal/racefixture. Run `go tool golangci-lint run ./internal/racefixture/...` to verify.

tasks.description: Change code in two packages so test-changed scope matters.
tasks.agent_prompt: Add Multiply(a, b int) int and TestMultiply in internal/racefixture (with tests). Also add a short comment above setupTempConfig in internal/config/config_test.go. Run tests for ./internal/racefixture/... and ./internal/config/...

tasks.description: Break a test; task 6 fixes it (signal recovery narrative).
tasks.agent_prompt: Break TestMultiply in internal/racefixture so it fails (wrong expected value). Do not fix it in this step.
Fix the failing TestMultiply in internal/racefixture from the previous task. Run `go test -race ./internal/racefixture/...`.

tasks.description: gofmt drift in Sum (caught by golangci-lint gofmt).
tasks.agent_prompt: Introduce gofmt formatting drift in the Sum function in internal/racefixture/racefixture.go (misaligned braces or spacing) so golangci-lint gofmt fails. Do not run gofmt to fix it in this step.

tasks.description: Small refactor with no behavior change; tests stay green.
tasks.agent_prompt: Fix the gofmt/lint issue in internal/racefixture from the previous task, then do a small no-behavior-change refactor in racefixture (e.g. extract a helper or clarify a comment). Keep all tests passing.

tasks.description: Add a table-driven test case in an existing file.
tasks.agent_prompt: Add a table-driven subtest case to an existing test in internal/racefixture (Sum or Multiply). Keep lint and tests green.

tasks.description: Adjust error wrapping or message in one function.
tasks.agent_prompt: In internal/racefixture, adjust error handling in one function (clearer message or fmt.Errorf wrap) without changing behavior covered by tests.
